title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lybrate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lybrate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Ranchi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
